html:
Exclusive to:

Garlic is a Vegetable Food Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can be grown randomly from Seeds or from Seed Pods and made into Roasted Garlic by being cooked at a Fire source. It can also be used by Warly to produce Garlic Powder with the Portable Grinding Mill. Feeding a Garlic to a bird in a Birdcage will produce 1 Seed Pods.

Roasted Garlic

 Usage

×3

×2

Recipes

×2

Filler cannot be Twigs or Meats

The Gorge

Only during the Event: The Gorge
Garlic is featured in The Gorge event of Don't Starve Together. It grows from Seed Pods, which can be bought from Pipton for one Old Coin. A Garlic can be made into Roast Garlic by being cooked at the Campfire next to the Swamp Pig Elder. Garlic can be used in a variety of Cooking Recipes exclusive to The Gorge.

Recipes

×2

×2

Trivia

  • Garlic was originally exclusive to The Gorge event, but it was later introduced into the main game along with the Warly Character Update.
  • Maxwell, Webber, and Walter's quotes refer to how garlic is used in folklore to ward away supernatural creatures, especially vampires. This is also the reason that Wortox hisses when he examines garlic.

Gallery

  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.

"garlic"
“The number one breath enhancer.”
–Wilson, when examining Garlic.
“It's just a couple cloves of garlic.”
–Willow, when examining Garlic.
“Is good flavor for stewing.”
–Wolfgang, when examining Garlic.
“It gives food flavor.”
–Wendy, when examining Garlic.
“I FILL MY MOUTH CAVITY WITH THEM TO REPEL HUMANS”
–WX-78, when examining Garlic.
“Allium sativum, a close relative of Allium cepa.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining Garlic.
“Homegrown.”
–Woodie, when examining Garlic.
“I suppose that's why there are no vampires around.”
–Maxwell, when examining Garlic.
“Föul ingredient!”
–Wigfrid, when examining Garlic.
“Maxwell says you ward monsters away with it.”
–Webber, when examining Garlic.
“Ah! The smell of fresh garlic!”
–Warly, when examining Garlic.
“Mmm... Smelly Dirt thing!”
–Wormwood, when examining Garlic.
“Makes everything taste better.”
–Winona, when examining Garlic.
“Hissss!”
–Wortox, when examining Garlic.
“Make breath smell nice.”
–Wurt, when examining Garlic.
“Wards off the vampires.”
–Walter, when examining Garlic.
“Just pop it in your mouth, it's good for you!”
–Wanda, when examining Garlic.
Garlic is a Vegetable Food Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can be grown randomly from Seeds or from Seed Pods and made into Roasted Garlic by being cooked at a Fire source. It can also be used by Warly to produce Garlic Powder with the Portable Grinding Mill. Feeding a Garlic to a bird in a Birdcage will produce 1 Seed Pods.

“Perfectly browned.”
–Wilson, when examining Roasted Garlic.
“Fire made it better.”
–Willow, when examining Roasted Garlic.
“Flavor is good now.”
–Wolfgang, when examining Roasted Garlic.
“It smells a bit nice.”
–Wendy, when examining Roasted Garlic.
“IT IS COOKED NOW”
–WX-78, when examining Roasted Garlic.
“Roast Allium sativum.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining Roasted Garlic.
“Lucy helped.”
–Woodie, when examining Roasted Garlic.
“I wonder if it still wards away the undead.”
–Maxwell, when examining Roasted Garlic.
“The stench!”
–Wigfrid, when examining Roasted Garlic.
“It didn't ward us off!”
–Webber, when examining Roasted Garlic.
“What can I add this to?”
–Warly, when examining Roasted Garlic.
“Mmm... Smells good”
–Wormwood, when examining Roasted Garlic.
“Bet that brought out the flavor.”
–Winona, when examining Roasted Garlic.
“Hissssss!”
–Wortox, when examining Roasted Garlic.
“Mmm... hot smelly snack!”
–Wurt, when examining Roasted Garlic.
“Too bad vampires never get to enjoy it.”
–Walter, when examining Roasted Garlic.
“Mmm, so fragrant!”
–Wanda, when examining Roasted Garlic.

Garlic was originally exclusive to The Gorge event, but it was later introduced into the main game along with the Warly Character Update.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Tỏi là một Thực phẩm Rau củ độc quyền của Don't Starve Together. Nó có thể được trồng ngẫu nhiên từ Hạt hoặc từ Vỏ Hạt và chế biến thành Tỏi Nướng bằng cách nấu ở Nguồn Lửa. Nó cũng có thể được Warly sử dụng để sản xuất Bột tỏi bằng Máy nghiền di động. Cho chim trong Lồng Chim ăn Tỏi sẽ tạo ra 1 Vỏ Hạt.

'''Garlic''' is a [[Vegetables|Vegetable]] [[Food]] [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It can be grown randomly from [[Seeds/DST|Seeds]] or from [[Crop Seeds/DST#Seed Pods|Seed Pods]] and made into '''Roasted Garlic''' by being cooked at a [[Fire]] source. It can also be used by [[Warly]] to produce [[Garlic Powder]] with the [[Portable Grinding Mill]]. Feeding a Garlic to a bird in a [[Birdcage]] will produce 1 [[Crop Seeds/DST#Seed Pods|Seed Pods]].

{{Recipe|item1 = Garlic|tool = Cooking|result = Roast Garlic}}
{{Recipe|item1 = Garlic|tool = Birdcage|result = Seed Pods}}

{{Recipe|item1 = Garlic|count1 = 3|tool = Portable Grinding Mill|result = Garlic Powder|resultcount = 2}}

=={{Pic|32|Cookbook}} Recipes ==
{{Recipe|item1 = Potatoes|count1=2|item2 = Garlics|item3 = Filler|tool = Crock Pot|result = Creamy Potato Purée|note = Filler cannot be [[Twigs]] or [[Meats]]}}
== {{Pic|32|Silver Bowl}} The Gorge ==
{{Event|The Gorge}}
Garlic is featured in ''[[The Gorge]]'' [[:Category:Events|event]] of ''Don't Starve Together''. It grows from Seed Pods, which can be bought from [[Pipton]] for one Old Coin. A Garlic can be made into Roast Garlic by being cooked at the [[Campfire]] next to the [[Swamp Pig Elder]]. Garlic can be used in a variety of [[The Gorge Recipes|Cooking Recipes]] exclusive to ''The Gorge''.
==={{Pic|32|Cookbook}} Recipes ===
{{Recipe
|item1 = Potatoes
|count1=2
|item2 = Garlics
|count2=1
|tool = Cookpot
|result = Garlic Mashed Potatoes}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Mushroom
|count1=1
|item2 = Garlics
|count2=1
|item3 = Onions
|count3=1
|tool = Small Casserole Dish
|result = Stuffed Mushroom}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Flour
|count1=1
|item2 = Garlics
|count2=1
|item3 = Goat Milk
|count3=2
|tool = Large Cookpot
|result = Creamy Fettuccine}}

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Garlic was originally exclusive to ''The Gorge'' event, but it was later introduced into the main game along with the [[Warly]] [[Don't Starve Together/Version History|Character Update]].
* [[Maxwell]], [[Webber]], and [[Walter]]'s quotes refer to how garlic is used in folklore to ward away supernatural creatures, especially vampires. This is also the reason that [[Wortox]] hisses when he examines garlic.
